banner: Did you know Spotlight PA is a nonprofit? Learn more about our work »
featured-promo-image-description: Support Spotlight PA's nonpartisan journalism and your gift will be DOUBLED.
sticky-image-description: Support Spotlight PA's independent, unbiased reporting for Pennsylvania and today, your gift will be DOUBLED.
support-text: We grant elected officials extraordinary power when we give them our vote, which means we must demand extraordinary accountability once they are in office. That's why Spotlight PA's trustworthy, unbiased local news is more important than ever, but it will disappear without your support. Today is Local News Day, and we need your support to keep going. As a special bonus, all gifts today will be DOUBLED by the Lenfest Institute for Journalism. We're independent, and we don't answer to shareholders or a big corporation. We're neutral in this polarized time, with no political agenda or opinion pieces. And we're a nonprofit, allowing us to prioritize fact-based investigative and public-service reporting for our community. Uncertain times call for decisive action, and more than 11,000 readers just like you — friends and neighbors who still give a damn about truth, accountability, and transparency — are getting behind Spotlight PA. Don't miss this chance TODAY ONLY to support our nonprofit reporting get get your tax-deductible contribution DOUBLED. Thank you! — Christopher Baxter, CEO/President PS: If you prefer to mail a check, you can send it to: Spotlight PA, PO Box 11728, Harrisburg, PA 17108-1728
takeover-dek: Today only, help raise $5K for Spotlight PA on Local News Day. All gifts DOUBLED until midnight »
